generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense spending, but look at what's actually happening in our communities. My neighbor's son, a firefighter, told me last week how their local emergency response drills have been cut back due to budget constraints. Meanwhile, we're seeing more extreme weather events every year. It's not about fear-mongering - it's about being practical. We need to make sure our communities have the resources they need to handle emergencies when they happen. #CommunitySafety #PreparednessMatters
